YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_CIDE.title: Astral Move - Cide
YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_CIDE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Star Point[/gold]: Skip target's next intent.
YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_DRAGON_SLAY.title: Astral Move - Dragon Slay
YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_DRAGON_SLAY.description:
Can only be played on [gold]Star Point[/gold].
Deal {CalculationBase:diff()} damage.
Benefit additional {ExtraDamage:diff()} {ExtraDamage:plural:time|times} bonus from [gold]Star Power[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deal [blue]{CalculatedDamage:diff()}[/blue] damage)|}

YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_FLY.title: Astral Move - Fly
YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_HIT.title: Astral Move - Hit
YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_HIT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
[gold]Star Point[/gold]: Attack once.
YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_POINT.title: Astral Move - Point
YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_STAND.title: Astral Move - Stand
YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_TIGER.title: Astral Move - Tiger
YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_TIGER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage three times.
[gold]Star Point[/gold]: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_TWIN_SWALLOWS.title: Astral Move - Twin Swallows
YX_ASTRAL_MOVE_TWIN_SWALLOWS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
[gold]Star Point[/gold]: Attack once.
[gold]Post Action[/gold]: Attack once.

Gain {YxTemporaryHpPower:diff()} [gold]Temporary HP[/gold].

YX_INCESSANT.title: Incessant
YX_JADE_SCROLL_OF_YIN_SYMBOL.title: Jade Scroll Of Yin Symbol
YX_JADE_SCROLL_OF_YIN_SYMBOL.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Increase damage to enemies with [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] by {YxJadeScrollOfYinSymbolPower:diff()}%.
Decrease damage from enemies with [gold]Weak[/gold] by {YxJadeScrollOfYinSymbolPower:diff()}%.

Gain {YxHexagramPower:diff()} [gold]Hexagram[/gold].
